steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage gives a general statement about tea sales for suffrage, then shows two specific examples in two different cities. The key signal is the PARALLEL PATTERN — the same promotional tactic applied in different locations.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Similarly” connects the two examples by showing that Nancy Tuttle Craig in Los Angeles did what the San Francisco activists did: distributed tea for suffrage.

The other choices signal different relationships — “For example” suggests supporting evidence, “To conclude” ends the discussion, and “In other words” indicates restatement.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
